findings.blocker: eqToHom-bridged Pi-product / unfolded-carrier type mismatch combined with outer-binder references at nested binding depths in summand body. All three plan routes (D')/(D'')/(D''') and several variants (G/H/I/X/Y) fail. Final commit is cosmetic ModuleCat.Hom.hom -> ConcreteCategory.hom rename at L592; no structural advance.
key_lemmas_used: ModuleCat.Hom.hom = ConcreteCategory.hom (C := ModuleCat R) (abbrev equality, iter-095 rfl-rewrite)

attempts.strategy: Unfold outer ConcreteCategory.hom to .hom + reverse ModuleCat.hom_comp to refold into categorical composition
attempts.code_tried: rw [show ∀ (x : ↑(∏ᶜ Z₂)), (ConcreteCategory.hom (Pi.π Z₂ j)) x = (Pi.π Z₂ j).hom x from fun _ => rfl, ← ModuleCat.hom_comp]
attempts.lean_error: second rewrite (← ModuleCat.hom_comp) pattern not found — needs g.hom ∘ₗ f.hom (LinearMap composition) but goal has g.hom (f.hom x) (function application)
attempts.goal_before: (ConcreteCategory.hom (Pi.π Z₂ j)) ((ConcreteCategory.hom ((∑ i, ...) ≫ eqToHom ⋯)) ((piIsoPi Z₁).toLinearEquiv.symm (r • y))) = r • (ConcreteCategory.hom (Pi.π Z₂ j)) ((ConcreteCategory.hom (... same expression ...)) ((piIsoPi Z₁).toLinearEquiv.symm y))
attempts.insight: The eqToHom-source obstruction surfaces one structural layer up. The intermediate type between (Pi.π Z₂ j) and the inner (∑F) ≫ eqToHom is def-equal but not syntactically equal — same problem as iter-093, just at the outer composition.

attempts.strategy: Direct ← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply to fuse outer composition
attempts.insight: Categorical-level (?g) ∘ (?f) requires syntactic agreement between ?f's codomain and ?g's domain. With unfolded Pi-product carrier on one side and named ∏ᶜ Z₂ on the other, agreement fails.

attempts.strategy: Unfold ConcreteCategory.hom to ModuleCat.Hom.hom (precursor to a different rewrite)
attempts.code_tried: rw [show ∀ (M N : ModuleCat.{u} k) (f : M ⟶ N) x, (ConcreteCategory.hom f) x = ModuleCat.Hom.hom f x from fun _ _ _ _ => rfl]
attempts.lean_error: no error — rewrite succeeds but does not advance toward a usable shape
attempts.goal_after: Goal in ModuleCat.Hom.hom form (no closer to a usable rewrite than the entry goal)
attempts.insight: Reverse of the eventual cosmetic commit. Witnesses that the two forms are abbrev-equal but does not lower HOU obstructions.

attempts.strategy: show + ← LinearMap.comp_apply at the outer Pi.π level
attempts.code_tried:
show (Pi.π Z₂ j).hom _ = r • (Pi.π Z₂ j).hom _
rw [← LinearMap.comp_apply]
attempts.lean_error: ← LinearMap.comp_apply pattern ?f (?g ?x) does not unify — intermediate type def-equal but not syntactically equal (eqToHom output is ModuleCat.of k (∀ i, ↑(Z₂ i)), Pi.π input is ∏ᶜ Z₂)
attempts.goal_after: show clause accepted, but ← LinearMap.comp_apply fails
attempts.insight: Exactly the iter-093 LinearMap.comp_apply blocker surfacing at the outer composition level. Cleared by superseding Edit (Attempt 7).

attempts.strategy: change to explicit term with _ holes for summand and eqToHom-source
attempts.code_tried: change (ConcreteCategory.hom (Pi.π Z₂ j)) ((ConcreteCategory.hom ((∑ i, _) ≫ eqToHom _)) _) = r • (ConcreteCategory.hom (Pi.π Z₂ j)) ((ConcreteCategory.hom ((∑ i, _) ≫ eqToHom _)) _)
attempts.lean_error: elaboration failure on the change target — Lean cannot fill the _ placeholders because the summand body and eqToHom's implicit argument live in metavariable contexts driven by dif_pos hRel
attempts.insight: change does not relax eqToHom-source metavariable HOU; the _-holes need elaboration support that the dif_pos metavariable context does not provide.

attempts.lean_error: Type mismatch — rfl has type ?m = ?m but is expected to have type @ModuleCat.Hom.hom k inst✝.toDivisionRing.toRing = ?m. Over-explicit @-form left too many underscores for the elaborator.
attempts.insight: The @-explicit form of show requires the elaborator to fill all the _ placeholders from context, but the ModuleCat ConcreteCategory typeclass instance is not directly findable from just the universe and DivisionRing.

attempts.strategy: Cosmetic rewrite using named-instance form of ConcreteCategory.hom
attempts.code_tried: rw [show ModuleCat.Hom.hom = ConcreteCategory.hom (C := ModuleCat.{u} k) from rfl]
attempts.lean_error: none — file compiles, lean_diagnostic_messages returns [] for severity=error
attempts.goal_after: Goal identical except all occurrences of ModuleCat.Hom.hom are spelled ConcreteCategory.hom
attempts.insight: Cosmetic only. ModuleCat.Hom.hom and ConcreteCategory.hom (C := ModuleCat R) are abbrev-equal per Mathlib/Algebra/Category/ModuleCat/Basic.lean L113-115. The rename does NOT lower HOU obstructions — downstream rw [← CategoryTheory.comp_apply] still fails at the same eqToHom-source obstruction (Attempts 9, 10).

attempts.strategy: Route (D′) variant — set F := (-1)^↑i • Pi.lift ... to name the summand
attempts.code_tried: set F : Fin (n + 1) → ((∏ᶜ Z₁ : ModuleCat.{u} k) ⟶ (∏ᶜ (fun i ↦ ModuleCat.of k (↑(C.left.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (∏ᶜ basicOpenCover ↑s₀ ∘ i))))) : ModuleCat.{u} k)) := fun i => ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ)) • Pi.lift fun i_1 ↦ ... (verbatim body) ...
attempts.lean_error: no error — elaboration succeeds — but set does NOT fold the goal (the literal sum body remains, NOT replaced with ∑ F)
attempts.goal_after: F is a hypothesis but the goal is unchanged (set did not unify summand with F's body)
attempts.insight: set only renames upon EXACT syntactic match. The plan's recipe required a change first to fold inner Pi.π (fun i ↦ ModuleCat.of k ↑(...)) back to a named Z₁-like form, but the inner family uses basicOpenCover ↑s₀ ∘ i (composition) whereas Z₁ uses fun a ↦ basicOpenCover ↑s₀ (i a) (applied). Eta-equivalent but not syntactically identical. The change fold cannot be expressed with Z₁ directly — and constructing a change target that matches WOULD itself contain the HOU blocker. Circular.

attempts.strategy: conv_lhs navigation + ← CategoryTheory.comp_apply at focus point
attempts.lean_error: rewrite fails at focus point — same eqToHom-source obstruction as outer-level direct rewrite
attempts.insight: conv does not relax HOU's syntactic-intermediate requirement. Categorical-level composition reconstruction still needs syntactic agreement between codomain of inner and domain of outer.
simp's HOU pre-filter rejects the first lemma; cascade does not fire. Same failure mode as iter-094 ensemble simp.

attempts.code_tried:
induction Finset.univ using Finset.cons_induction with
| empty => simp
| cons i s hi ih => sorry
attempts.lean_error: typeclass instance problem is stuck: Fintype ?m.1151 (and AddCommMonoid ?m.1153 in a Finset.sum_induction variant)
attempts.insight: Lean cannot determine the carrier type for Finset.univ because the sum's underlying carrier is implicit and the body has i in non-Miller positions. To make Route (D″) work, the WHOLE goal would need to be rephrased without the implicit Finset.univ (generalising to s : Finset (Fin (n+1)) outside the goal) — but that abstraction itself has the HOU blocker we're trying to break.

attempts.strategy: Per-summand Pi.lift_π_apply collapse and trivial rfl-rewrites
attempts.code_tried: simp only [Pi.lift_π_apply] / rw [show e₁.symm (r • y) = e₁.symm (r • y) from rfl] / conv_lhs => rw [Preadditive.sum_comp]
attempts.lean_error: all fail with no progress / pattern not found
attempts.insight: Pi.lift_π_apply requires Pi.lift ≫ Pi.π = ... shape (sum at outermost), not Pi.π (Pi.lift ≫ ... ≫ eqToHom) shape. The outer (Pi.π Z₂ j) and the inner Pi.lift are separated by the eqToHom and the categorical composition; the lemma cannot fire.

next_steps: Three syntactic routes (D′)/(D″)/(D‴) and the cosmetic prep-step are exhausted. Iter-096 should invoke the refactor subagent to reformulate `scK₀.f` coordinate-wise from the start, bypassing the Pi.lift / Pi.π / eqToHom construction in the closed term. Concretely: define scK₀.f.hom : (∀ i, Z₁ i) →ₗ[k] (∀ j, Z₂ j) directly as (s • y) j := Σᵢ (-1)^i (presheaf-restriction)(y (j ∘ δᵢ)) in coordinates. R-linearity then follows from per-summand R-linearity of each presheaf-restriction. See task_results/Cohomology_BasicOpenCech.lean.md for the detailed refactor directive. This requires REFACTORING the signature of cechCofaceMap_pi_smul (or adding a new top-level helper); estimated 1-2 iterations; mathematical content unchanged.
Off-limits this iter per PROGRESS.md — gated on cechCofaceMap_pi_smul. Will become attempt-ready once the iter-096 refactor lands.
